letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice megacloud-202509

To the Billing Department, MegaCloud Inc.:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice megacloud-202509, covering the
billing period 2025-09-01 through 2025-09-30.

Per the governing clause (Amendment 2 §6):

    "Customer shall pay a one-time data migration fee of $2,500.00, due upon the September 2025 migration window."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $183,800.00.
The invoice as billed totals $186,300.00, a discrepancy of $2,500.00.

Calculation:
  - Data migration fee: expected 0.00, billed 2500.00 (overcharge of 2500.00)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $2,500.00 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Customer shall pay a one-time data migration fee of $2,500.00, due upon the September 2025 migration window.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 2500.00.
